results.justification: All pass criteria met: PM/Legal contradiction explicitly identified and escalated as first escalation with three resolution options. Clock-start ambiguity identified (assumptions note '2-hour window starts at order placement time, not at pickup time' and edge case covers the 14-minute pickup scenario). Wrong-address exception from Finance noted as BR-6 with dedicated escalation on adjudication process. Auto-refund vs 3-day processing conflict noted in low_confidence_areas and BR-9's relationship to BR-7. 10 business rules extracted with correct invariant classifications (BR-1 through BR-3 as invariants, BR-4 through BR-10 as non-invariants). 6 formal escalations covering contradiction, ambiguities, and missing context. Confidence level is 40, well below the 50 threshold.

observations.text: PM/Legal contradiction is the lead escalation with thorough analysis including three options and the creative 'Express Promise' recommendation — shows domain judgment, not just detection.
Clock-start ambiguity addressed both as an explicit assumption and indirectly through the pickup-timing edge case, demonstrating awareness of the operational impact.
Wrong-address exception not only captured as BR-6 but given its own escalation with adjudication options — goes beyond identification to actionable resolution paths.
Auto-refund vs 3-business-day processing conflict explicitly called out in low_confidence_areas and inferable from BR-9 and BR-7 tension.
10 well-structured business rules with correct invariant/non-invariant classifications and testable assertions — exceeds the 5-rule minimum significantly.
6 escalations covering contradiction, ambiguity, and missing context types — exceeds the 2-escalation minimum with high quality.
Confidence at 40 with well-articulated reasoning, clear separation of high/low confidence areas, and explicit assumptions — appropriately calibrated for the level of contradiction.
Edge cases are exceptionally thorough — boundary conditions (exactly 10km), temporal edge cases (late-night orders, driver cancels near window end), and multi-warehouse scenarios all covered.
Business impact analysis identifies brand/legal liability risk as HIGH and connects the PM/Legal contradiction to concrete consequences (regulatory scrutiny, class-action risk).
Ubiquitous language uses 'Goodwill Refund' framing that reflects the Legal position without silently resolving the contradiction — linguistically honest.

grader_results.detail: field escalations[*].type equals check failed: expected 'contradiction', got values: 'ambiguity', 'ambiguity', 'ambiguity', 'missing_context', 'missing_context'

meta.notes: Preliminary scoring by Coach K. Human review pending via HTML report.
